allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); text=data[0][''''text'''']; parsed=json.loads\(text\); cves=parsed.get\(''''cves'''',[]\); print\(json.dumps\([{''''id'''':c[''''id''''],''''description'''':c[''''description''''][:200],''''severity'''':c[''''severity''''],''''score'''':c[''''score''''],''''published'''':c[''''published''''],''''weaknesses'''':c.get\(''''weaknesses'''',''''''''\)} for c in cves[:15]], indent=2\)\)")
